mapper.select: SELECT board_idx, file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size, file_down_count FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} ORDER BY file_idx ASC
SELECT board_idx, file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size, file_down_count FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} AND file_idx = #{file_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CMS_BOARD_FILE_IDX_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD_FILE ( board_idx, file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size, add_date ) VALUES ( #{board_idx}, #{file_idx}, #{real_file_name}, #{file_name}, #{file_ext_name}, #{file_size}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_FILE SET file_down_count = file_down_count + 1 WHERE file_idx = #{file_idx}
